description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch upholstered in a dark gray fabric, featuring a clean and boxy silhouette. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, while the backrest is slightly curved and includes two back cushions with subtle button tufting for added detail. Two decorative throw pillows with a geometric pattern in light colors provide contrast and visual interest. The armrests are straight and moderately high, blending seamlessly into the overall rectangular form of the couch. The legs are short, blocky, and black, elevating the couch slightly off the ground. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern dark gray two-seater couch with button-tufted back cushions, geometric throw pillows, and short black block legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight armrest, two patterned throw pillows, and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the continuous, slightly curved backrest and the uniform dark gray upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest, throw pillows, and cushion arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the two seat cushions, button-tufted back cushions, and two geometric-patterned throw pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two back cushions, all attached and button-tufted; two loose, patterned throw pillows placed at each end.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric upholstery with subtle button tufting on the back cushions; throw pillows feature a geometric, star-like pattern in light beige and blue-green.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed, block-style legs in black, providing a sturdy and minimalistic base.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, moderately high armrests with a slight outward angle, fully upholstered in the same dark gray fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, slightly curved backrest with two attached, button-tufted cushions for support and comfort.
